ab: Nanaji dhuq ku sapah pyasan saya ka yaku.
en: I arrived at school at seven today.

ab: Smluhay muyas da, mtmay nniqan slhayan ka mptusa, rmngaw ka mdudul mpuyas “ Tutuy ! Thmuku.”
ch: 上課了，老師走進教室，班長說:「起立!敬禮!」
en: It’s time for class , the teacher walked into the classroom, and the monitor said: “Stand up! Salute!”

ab: Tpuyaq ta rmngaw kana, ：“Mputsa, sndamac su balay.”
Smluhay nami muyas cida, tmsa yami rmngaw kari Sediq quri sspu ka mptusa.
ch: 上課的時候，老師教我們數字的族語。
en: In class, the teacher taught us the Seediq language of numbers.

ab: Smnul nami mptusa smpu mi, msupu nami muyas uyas spuwan.
ch: 我們跟著老師唸，我們唱了數字歌。
en: We followed the teacher to read, we sang the number song.

ab: Wada kari bay snlhayan mu kari Sediq ka yaku.
en: I have learned many Seediq languages.

ab: Musa ku sapah pyasan kddiyax, sluhay ku kari Sediq kddiyax, pqbhangun mu rmngaw kari Sediq ni ka bubu mu.
ch: 我天天上學，我天天學族語，我要講給媽媽聽。
en: I go to school every day, I learn the Seediq language every day, and I want to tell my mother.
